zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Lacy於大約1144年出生在英國英格蘭艾可可拉維林時，他的父親Richard fitz Eustace18歲，母親Aubrey de Lisours17歲。他和Alice of Essex至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他於1163年被列為constable of chester。他去世於1183年10月11日在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Lacy于大约1144年出生在英国英格兰艾可可拉維林时，他的父亲Richard fitz Eustace18岁，母亲Aubrey de Lisours17岁。他和Alice of Essex至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他于1163年被列为constable of chester。他去世于1183年10月11日在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Lacy was born about 1144, in Clavering, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard fitz Eustace, was 18 and his mother, Aubrey de Lisours, was 17. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Alice of Essex. In 1163, at the age of 20, his occupation is listed as constable of chester. He died on 11 October 1183, in Acre, Northern, Israel, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Lacy est né environ 1144, à Clavering, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard fitz Eustace, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Aubrey de Lisours, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Alice of Essex. En 1163, à l’âge de 20 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of chester. Il est décédé le 11 octobre 1183, à Acre, Northern, Israël, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Lacy um 1144 in Clavering, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard fitz Eustace 18 und seine Mutter Aubrey de Lisours 17. Er hatte mit Alice of Essex mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1163, als er 20 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als constable of chester aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. Oktober 1183 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Acre, Northern, Israel.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Lacy è nato il circa 1144 nel Clavering, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard fitz Eustace, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Aubrey de Lisours, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Alice of Essex. Nel 1163, all'età di 20 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of chester. Morì il 11 ottobre 1183, nel Acre, Northern, Israele, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Lacyが約1144年にイギリスイギリスエセックスクラバーイングで生まれた時，父Richard fitz Eustaceは18歳，母Aubrey de Lisoursは17歳であった。彼はAlice of Essexとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。1163年，20歳の時，職業はconstable of chesterと記録されている。彼は1183年10月11日にイスラエルמחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Lacy(이)가 대략 1144년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 클레이버링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard fitz Eustace(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Aubrey de Lisours(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Alice of Essex(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1163년, 20세의 나이로 그의 직업은 constable of chester이었다. 그는 1183년 10월 11일 이스라엘 מחוז הצפון עַכּוֹ에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Clavering, Essex, England: Clavering, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Lacy nasceu aproximadamente 1144, em Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard fitz Eustace, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Aubrey de Lisours, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Alice of Essex. Em 1163, com 20 anos, sua profissão aparece como constable of chester. Ele faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1183, em Acre, Northern, Israel, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Lacy родился около 1144 г. в местности клавиринг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard fitz Eustace было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Aubrey de Lisours, 17. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Alice of Essex. В 1163 году, в возрасте 20 лет,  он работал по профессии constable of chester. Он умер 11 октября 1183 г. в местности עַכּוֹ, מחוז הצפון, Израиль в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Lacy nació aproximadamente 1144, en Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard fitz Eustace, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Aubrey de Lisours, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Alice of Essex. En 1163, a la edad de 20 años, su ocupación registrada era constable of chester. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1183, en Acre, Northern, Israel, a la edad de 40 años.
